case_title: MAINZER & ASSOCIATES VS. JESSICA JADE LEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY MAINZER & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JESSICA JADE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 8/10/15. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: MARC SEIDENFELD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAINZER & ASSOCIATES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-26-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, AS CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS FOR $600 PLUS COSTS. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM HAS INCREASED SINCE FILING TO $800.00 ( 4 X 150.00 + 1 X 150.00 + 50.00) (LATE FEE = 150.00 NSF= 50) PARTIES AGREE TO SETTLE FOR $800.00 TO PLAINTIFF WHO WAIVES COSTS", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY F. W. MANZIER--MANAGING PARTNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED JUN-16-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JESSICA JADE
